title: Building
description: A NYC building as tracked by the Department of Buildings, keyed on BIN (Building Identification Number) and its tax lot (BBL). This is the join spine for every DOB record — filings, permits, violations, complaints, and certificates of occupancy all reference a building by BIN/BBL. Reconciles the legacy Building Information System (BIS Web, a810-bisweb.nyc.gov) with the 'Property Data (Buildings Information System)' Open Data extract (e98g-f8hy) and the location columns present on the filing/permit datasets.

x-source.note: No public per-building API; BIS Web is a browser-only legacy application (Akamai-gated). This schema is the proposed owned resource.

bin.description: Building Identification Number — the 7-digit DOB building key (Open Data 'Permit BIN').

landmarked.description: Whether the building is landmarked (Open Data 'Landmarked').
